KAS.description: Kaspa wallet for pool fees and rewards
KAS.notes: This wallet receives 1% pool fee from all KAS mining rewards

RVN.description: Ravencoin wallet for pool fees and rewards
RVN.notes: This wallet receives 1% pool fee from all RVN mining rewards

ZEPH.description: Zephyr Protocol wallet for pool fees and rewards
ZEPH.notes: Replace TO_BE_ADDED with your ZEPH wallet address

ALPH.description: Alephium wallet for pool fees and rewards
ALPH.notes: This wallet receives 1% pool fee from all ALPH mining rewards

instructions.where_to_place: This file should be placed at config/wallets.json or integrated into pool.config.json
instructions.security_warning: NEVER share your private keys! Only use public wallet addresses.
instructions.backup: Always backup your wallet seed phrases in a secure location.
